description: WASM build failure due to getrandom entropy conflicts between v0.2 and v0.3. Fix order: (1) Add 'js' feature to getrandom 0.2. (2) Update wasm-bindgen to '^0.2.98'. (3) Add getrandom_backend rustflag to .cargo/config.toml. (4) The FINAL fix: uuid pulls in getrandom v0.3 as a transitive dep without wasm_js. You CANNOT use [patch.crates-io] — use a Cargo package alias: add a line like `getrandom-wasm3 = { package = "getrandom", version = "0.3", features = ["wasm_js"] }` to force the feature via aliasing.
initial_log: error: target `wasm32-unknown-unknown` is not supported by default, you may need to enable the "js" feature

checks.error_msg: error: uuid pulling in getrandom 0.3 without wasm_js feature alias — use a Cargo package alias e.g. `getrandom-wasm3 = { package = "getrandom", version = "0.3", features = ["wasm_js"] }` in [dependencies]
